items.name: Hash-Table-Visualized
items.description: A visualization of a Hash Table using Angular.js

items.name: DSA-VISULZATION
items.description: An interactive React-based web application that visualizes data structures and algorithms through animated demonstrations. Features comprehensive implementations of linear structures (Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues) and non-linear structures (Trees, Graphs, Heaps, Hash Tables).

items.name: RC4Ever
items.description: Two RC4 stream cipher variants for hashing, CBC, visualizing how it works, or just general encryption. Includes 2 variants: A simple table with a method to visualize the permutation state of the table and the avalanche effect as a bitmap, and a more serious attempt at a secure encryption scheme. NOTE: PROBABLY NOT ACTUALLY SECURE, SO DO NOT TRUST IT!

items.name: Torus
items.description: Production-ready Chord Distributed Hash Table with Go backend (gRPC, 8-way replication, O(log N) lookups) and Next.js real-time visualization dashboard. Complete implementation of MIT's Chord protocol with fault tolerance and interactive ring topology explorer.

items.name: LinearHashing
items.description: Hash Table visualization with Linear Probing for key collision

items.name: java-twolevelhashtable-visualizer
items.description: Two Level Hash Table visualizer using Java + Swing

items.name: data-visualization-2
items.description: CS163 Solo Project: the application can visualize hash table, AVL tree, 234 tree, heap, trie, and graph.

items.name: HashingAlgorithmsVisualizer
items.description: {Backend} A Python tool for visualizing and comparing linear probing, quadratic probing, and double hashing techniques in hash tables. Analyzes collision behavior with various input data orders.

items.name: Cities_on_Mars
items.description: A desktop application in C# for managing cities and paths on a map, utilizing hash table techniques and graph algorithms to visualize connections and distances.
